summary: The diff implements most of REQ-17 and REQ-18 requirements. ChatView is rebuilt with persistent friends sidebar, public/private chat areas, VideoCallModal integration, auth gating, and profile setup flow. All major UI sections (MessageFeed, MessageInput, FriendsPanel, PrivateChatView, VideoCallModal) are present. FriendListItem includes a video call button, PrivateChatView header includes a video call button. DisplayNamePrompt handles new-user onboarding and calls onComplete to transition to the full UI. The implementation appears comprehensive with a minor concern about the video call button visibility in FriendListItem for non-selected items.

missing_requirements.requirement: Each friend list item displays a video call button that is always visible and accessible
missing_requirements.reason: In FriendListItem.tsx, the video call button for non-selected friends has 'opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100' CSS classes, making it invisible at zero opacity until hovered. This could fail the acceptance criteria requiring no hidden or zero-height containers and the button to be readily accessible.
